title: Publishing app using API
excerpt: I am looking at setting up a cicd pipe line and I was wondering if it was possible to publish an app through the API. Basically when you are on the “App Versions” tab under the actions you have an option ‘Promote to Live…

posts.author: nharviel (Nicholas Harviel)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking at setting up a cicd pipe line and I was wondering if it was possible to publish an app through the API. Basically when you are on the “App Versions” tab under the actions you have an option ‘Promote to Live’. I was just wondering if this was possible using your API.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @nharviel!

As of today there is no way of promoting an app’s version via API

Let us know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
-Matias
